title: Fit test - Onboarding Flow - Start Fit Test
scenario: Fit Test onboarding flow does not transition to Position screen after clicking Test button on Fit Test screen
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with a supported Poly Bluetooth audio device connected.
Proceed through the onboarding flow to the Fit Test screen (after the Pairing 2 screen).
Verify the Fit Test screen displays correctly.
expected: The first Fit Test screen (Position screen) is displayed.
